channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Washington school board begs state to keep trans athletes out of girls' sports after girls were affected
item.description: A school board in Washington passed a resolution urging its athletic conference to reconsider its stance on trans inclusion in girls sports.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: It's Boise St, not BYU, with a bye in latest College Football Playoff rankings, with Oregon at No. 1
item.description: Boise State received the fourth and final bye in Tuesday night's College Football Playoff rankings, leaving BYU out of that mix and placing the Big 12 alongside the SEC on the list of power conferences with a gripe.
item.dc:creator: EDDIE PELLS, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Oklahoma coach Brent Venables keeping 'great faith' amid wife Julie's latest cancer diagnosis
item.description: Oklahoma football coach Brent Venables took a few moments during his show to share details about his wife Julie's latest fight with cancer.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Lynne Roberts leaves Utah for WNBA job
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - In a shocking announcement Tuesday evening, Lynne Roberts is leaving the University of Utah women's basketball program to become the head coach of the Los Angeles Sparks of the WNBA.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: WNBA star Caitlin Clark spotted jawing at referees from the stands during Iowa game
item.description: The former Hawkeyes star returned to the state where she set numerous college basketball records to watch Iowa keep its undefeated record intact during a game against Drake.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: After Nick Bosa celebration, ‘Trump dance’ takes sports world by storm
item.description: Days after Trump's reelection, the 49ers defensive end celebrated a sack in the team's win over Tampa Bay.
item.dc:creator: CNN.com Wire Service, The Mercury News

item.title: Colorado superfan Miss Peggy shares message about late twin sister on 100th birthday after Buffaloes win
item.description: Colorado superfan Peggy Coppom, or Miss Peggy as fans call her, celebrated her 100th birthday with head coach Deion Sanders at a press conference Tuesday.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: 76ers star Joel Embiid ripped in team meeting for being late to 'everything': report
item.description: After the Philadelphia 76ers fell to 2-11, they reportedly held a team meeting where Joel Embiid was called out for being late to "everything.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: White Sox call up Colson Montgomery, Juan Carela from minor leagues
item.description: The Chicago White Sox have selected the contracts of shortstop Colson Montgomery and right-handed pitcher Juan Carela, both of whom are highly rated in the organization, to their 40-man roster.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, WGN 9

item.title: Bruins fire coach Jim Montgomery after slow start in regular season follows playoff disappointments
item.description: BOSTON (AP) — Boston coach Jim Montgomery, who led the Bruins to the greatest regular season in NHL history but never got them past the second round of the playoffs, was fired Tuesday, a day after the below-.500 team lost to last-place Columbus to extend its losing streak to three games.
item.dc:creator: JIMMY GOLEN, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: NHL referee Mitch Dunning is home and expects to make a full recovery, league says
item.description: The NHL referee who was stretchered out of a game following a violent collision with Colorado defenseman Josh Manson was back home and expected to make a full recovery.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: USU seeks to overturn loss in forfeited volleyball game against San Jose State
item.description: Just hours after Utah lawmakers urged Utah State University to join a Title IX lawsuit against the Mountain West Conference, the Logan-based school filed a motion to join the lawsuit, in part.
item.dc:creator: Derick Fox, ABC 4

item.title: Shaun White's new halfpipe league to air on NBC, Peacock
item.description: The new action-sports league being launched by Shaun White will air on NBC and stream on Peacock beginning next year. White announced earlier this year that he was putting together The Snow League, a four-stop circuit that will feature halfpipe snowboarding and freeskiing.
item.dc:creator: EDDIE PELLS, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: High school football rankings Week 13, 2024: Bay Area News Group Top 25
item.description: South San Francisco enters the rankings, other teams rise and fall after first round of section playoffs
item.dc:creator: Joseph Dycus, The Mercury News

item.title: Debris falls from roof at home of Cowboys before game against Texans
item.description: A piece of the roof at the home of the Dallas Cowboys fell to the field while the retractable portion of it was being opened at least three hours before a 34-10 loss to Houston on Monday night, officials said.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Bulls great Bob Love dead at 81 after battle with cancer
item.description: CHICAGO (WGN) — An all-star for the Chicago Bulls in the 1970's, franchise great Bob Love has died at the age of 81 after a long battle with cancer, the team announced Monday. Love played from 1968 to 1976 with the Chicago Bulls and was affectionately nicknamed "Butterbean" for his kind demeanor.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, WGN 9

item.title: FAU fires Tom Herman as coach after a 6-16 record in parts of two seasons
item.description: Florida Atlantic fired coach Tom Herman on Monday with two games left in his second season at the school, neither of which resulted in a winning record.
item.dc:creator: Tim Reynolds, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Beyoncé performing at halftime of NFL Christmas Day game on Netflix
item.description: Beyoncé is coming to your home on Christmas — provided you have Netflix and are tuning in to the Baltimore Ravens-Houston Texans game.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Jazz comeback falls short against Clippers, 116-105
item.description: LOS ANGELES (ABC4 Sports) - James Harden moved into second place on the NBA's career 3-point list and had 20 points and 11 assists to help the Los Angeles Clippers beat the Utah Jazz 116-105 on Sunday night to end a three-game losing streak. Harden moved past Ray Allen with No.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Rays will have to weather the storm next season at Steinbrenner Field
item.description: As the Tampa Bay Rays begin to gather information for their 2025 season at Steinbrenner Field in Tampa, the most unpredictable and challenging element will most likely be weather.
item.dc:creator: Daniel Lucas, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Bears show moxie against Packers, fall short for 4th straight week as Santos FG is blocked as time expires
item.description: The Chicago Bears lost to the Green Bay Packers 20-19, setting a new record for the longest win streak in the historic rivalry, breaking a tie with a 10-game win streak from 1994 to 1998.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, WGN 9

item.title: BYU suffers first loss of season to Kansas, 17-13
item.description: PROVO, Utah (ABC4 Sports) - BYU still has a great shot at the Big 12 Championship Game, but the Cougars undefeated season came to an end Saturday night against Kansas. Jalon Daniels threw for 169 yards, Dylan Neal ran for two touchdowns and Kansas upset No.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: CMU drops final game at home against Western Colorado
item.description: GRAND JUNCTION, Colo. (KREX)—After a six-game winning streak, Colorado Mesa University was dealt a setback by South Dakota Mines. Now, the Mavericks return to their home field with the stakes as high as the Rocky Mountains, aiming to secure a playoff spot.
item.dc:creator: Titus Cleveland, KREX 5

item.title: Draymond Green's foul against Zach Edey is upgraded by the NBA to a flagrant 1
item.description: Golden State forward Draymond Green's foul against Memphis' Zach Edey in the third quarter of the Warriors' victory over the Grizzlies has been upgraded to a category-one flagrant, the NBA said Saturday after reviewing the play.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Bulls look to break Rockets' 4-game win streak Sunday
item.description: Houston Rockets (9-4, third in the Western Conference) vs. Chicago Bulls (5-8, 10th in the Eastern Conference) Chicago; Sunday, 7 p.m. EST BOTTOM LINE: Houston is looking to prolong its four-game win streak with a victory against Chicago. The Bulls are 1-4 in home games.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Jump around: Cavaliers improve to 14-0, celebrate by dancing with frog mascot
item.description: They continued their perfect start, improving to 14-0 on Friday night with a 144-126 win over the Chicago Bulls in an NBA Cup opener that served as another showcase for a Cavs team clicking like never before.
item.dc:creator: TOM WITHERS, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Former Detroit Lions player charged over Capitol riot
item.description: A former Detroit Lions linebacker was arrested and charged with allegedly assaulting law enforcement and other offenses over the Jan. 6, 2021, Capitol riot, according to the Department of Justice (DOJ).
item.dc:creator: Filip Timotija, WGN 9

item.title: Garrett Crochet named AL Comeback Player of the Year
item.description: Chicago White Sox pitcher Garrett Crochet was named American League Comeback Player of the Year after a successful season as a starting pitcher, striking out 209 batters over 32 starts.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, WGN 9
